parsed.production_notes: The main character's face exhibits uncanny smoothness and slightly unnatural lip-sync typical of AI avatars. Furthermore, the students in the foreground are completely static throughout the entire 44-second shot, indicating a still image was used as a background plate.

characters.appearance: Young boy, approximately 10-12 years old. Slim build, medium brown complexion. Short, neatly parted black hair.
characters.wardrobe: Blue long-sleeve button-down shirt, tucked into khaki trousers.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young boy stands in front of a dark grey smartboard in a classroom. He wears a blue long-sleeve button-down shirt and khaki trousers. He holds a white stylus in his right hand. In the foreground, the backs of several students' heads and shoulders are visible, sitting at wooden desks. The lighting is bright and even. The boy looks directly forward.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows a young boy acting as a teacher in a classroom. He stands in front of a smartboard with English alphabet examples written on it. He speaks directly to the camera, gesturing with a stylus. Captions of his speech appear at the bottom of the screen. The students in the foreground remain completely still throughout the shot.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: A for APPLE, B for BALL, जैसी इंग्लिश तो सीख ली, लेकिन आज तक इंग्लिश में ढंग से सेंटेंस तक नहीं बोल पाते हो। [You have learned English like A for APPLE, B for BALL, but till today you can't even speak a proper sentence in English.]
Character A says: ऐसे तो तुम्हारी कोई इज्जत नहीं करेगा। [Like this, no one will respect you.]
Character A says: इससे अच्छा, तुम आज के आज इस ऐप पे रोज़ सिर्फ 15 मिनट इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस करके देखो। [Better than this, you try practicing English for just 15 minutes daily on this app from today itself.]
Character A says: देखना फिर कैसे फर्राटेदार इंग्लिश बोलते हो। [Then see how fluently you speak English.]
Character A says: इस ऐप को इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप कहते हैं, यहाँ सिर्फ सिखाने वाली वीडियोस आते हैं। [This app is called English Seekho app, here only teaching videos come.]
Character A says: कोई ऐड्स नहीं आते। [No ads come.]
Character A says: इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप पे स्पोकन इंग्लिश यानी बोलने वाली अंग्रेजी का एक शो आता है। [On the English Seekho app, there is a show for spoken English, that is, spoken English.]
Character A says: एक्सपर्ट्स छोटे-छोटे वीडियोस में स्टेप बाय स्टेप इंग्लिश बोलना सिखाते हैं। [Experts teach how to speak English step by step in short videos.]
Character A says: तो बस रोज़ का 15 मिनट निकालो, एक्सपर्ट के वीडियोस देखो, एआई कोच से प्रैक्टिस करो, ट्रायल सिर्फ एक रुपये का है। [So just take out 15 minutes daily, watch expert videos, practice with AI coach, the trial is for just one rupee.]
Character A says: फिर देखना, कुछ दिनों में तुम्हारी इंग्लिश देख के लोग दंग रह जाएंगे। [Then see, in a few days people will be amazed to see your English.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
A for APPLE
B for BALL
C for CAT
D for DOG
E for ELEPHANT
F for FROG
(Plus Hindi captions matching the audio)

panels.panel_visual_description: A smartphone is displayed vertically in the center against a solid light purple background. The phone has a black bezel and a blank white screen. Below the phone is a solid purple rounded rectangular shape.

scenes.visual_description: An end card graphic featuring a smartphone mockup displaying the 'English Seekho' app logo. Below the phone is a purple 'INSTALL NOW' button. The background is a solid light purple.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: तो इंस्टॉल बटन पे क्लिक करो और इंग्लिश सीखो ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [So click on the install button and download the English Seekho app.]

scenes.visual_description: A standard disclaimer screen with white text on a solid black background.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Disclaimer
English Seekho kisi bhi government authority, institution, brand, organisation ya individual ke dwara endorsed, sponsored, affiliated ya associated nahi hai. Kisi bhi names, trademarks, logos ya references ka use sirf educational aur informational purposes ke liye kiya gaya hai. Kuch content sirf samjhane ke liye dramatised ya representational ho sakta hai. English Seekho kisi bhi guaranteed results ka promise nahi karta. Outcomes individual effort aur doosre factors par depend karte hain aur vary kar sakte hain.
